sourcesContent:
import { SITE_CONFIG } from '../../../utils/baseConfig';

export default {
  auth: {
    loginTitle: 'Sign In',
    loginSubtitle: 'Enter your credentials to continue',
    registerTitle: 'Create Account',
    registerSubtitle: 'Fill in the information below to register a new account',
    forgotPasswordTitle: 'Forgot Password',
    forgotPasswordSubtitle: 'We will send a verification code to your email',
    resetPasswordTitle: 'Reset Password',
    resetPasswordSubtitle: 'Set your new password',
    noAccount: 'Don’t have an account?',
    hasAccount: 'Already have an account?',
    alreadyHaveAccount: 'Already have an account?',
    rememberPassword: 'Remember password?',
    createAccount: 'Create Account',
    loginNow: 'Sign In Now',
    resetNow: 'Reset Password',
    alreadyLoggedIn: 'You are already signed in, redirecting to dashboard',
    emailRequired: 'Please enter your email',
    emailInvalid: 'Please enter a valid email address',
    passwordRequired: 'Please enter your password',
    confirmPasswordRequired: 'Please confirm your password',
    passwordTooShort: 'Password must be at least 8 characters long',
    passwordsDoNotMatch: 'Passwords do not match',
    loginSuccess: 'Signed in successfully',
    loginFailed: 'Sign-in failed, please check your credentials',
    registerSuccess: 'Registered successfully',
    registerFailed: 'Registration failed, please try again later',
    resetSuccess: 'Reset link sent to your email',
    resetFailed: 'Password reset failed, please try again later',
    logoutSuccess: 'Signed out successfully',
    logoutFailed: 'Sign-out failed',
    newPassword: 'New Password',
    confirmPassword: 'Confirm Password',
    codeRequired: 'Please enter the verification code',
    codeInvalid: 'Invalid verification code',
    codeSent: 'Verification code sent',
    checkSpam: 'If you Don’t receive the email after a while, please check your spam folder',
    sendCodeFailed: 'Failed to send verification code',
    popup: {
      close_btn: 'I understand',
      wait_close_btn: 'Please wait {seconds}s'
    },
    passwordResetSuccess: 'Password reset successfully',
    passwordResetFailed: 'Password reset failed, please try again later',
    inviteCode: 'Invitation Code',
    inviteCodePlaceholder: 'Enter your invitation code',
    inviteCodeRequired: 'Invitation code cannot be empty',
    agreeToTerms: 'I have read and agree to',
    termsOfService: 'Terms of Service',
    mustAgreeToTerms: 'You must agree to the Terms of Service to register',
    emailPlaceholder: 'Enter email address',
    emailPrefixPlaceholder: 'Enter email prefix',
    codePlaceholder: 'Enter verification code',
    newPasswordPlaceholder: 'Enter new password',
    confirmPasswordPlaceholder: 'Re-enter new password',
    passwordPlaceholder: 'Enter password',
    requiresAuth: 'Sign-in required',
    domainNotAuthorized: 'Domain not authorized',
    contactAdmin: 'Please contact the administrator for authorization',
    captcha: 'CAPTCHA Verification',
    captchaRequired: 'Please complete the CAPTCHA verification',
    verifyTokenSuccess: 'Token verification successful',
    verifyTokenFailed: 'Token verification failed, please try again'
  },
  validation: {
    required: '{field} cannot be empty',
    email: 'Please enter a valid email address',
    minLength: '{field} must be at least {length} characters long',
    maxLength: '{field} cannot exceed {length} characters',
    passwordMatch: 'Passwords do not match',
    emailRequired: 'Please enter an email address',
    emailInvalid: 'Please enter a valid email address',
    passwordRequired: 'Please enter a password',
    confirmPasswordRequired: 'Please confirm the password',
    passwordsDontMatch: 'Passwords do not match',
    codeRequired: 'Please enter the verification code'
  },
  errors: {
    networkError: 'Network error, please check your connection',
    serverError: 'Server error, please try again later',
    unauthorized: 'Unauthorized, please sign in',
    forbidden: 'Access forbidden, insufficient permissions',
    notFound: 'Page not found',
    notFoundDescription: 'Sorry, the page you visited does not exist or has been removed',
    backToHome: 'Back to Home',
    unknown: 'Unknown error occurred',
    browserRestricted: 'Browser access restricted'
  },
  messages: {
    loginSuccess: 'Signed in successfully',
    loginFailed: 'Sign-in failed, please check your credentials',
    registerSuccess: 'Registered successfully',
    registerFailed: 'Registration failed, please try again later',
    passwordResetSuccess: 'Password reset successfully',
    passwordResetFailed: 'Password reset failed, please try again later',
    logoutSuccess: 'Signed out successfully',
    codeSent: 'Verification code sent',
    sendCodeFailed: 'Failed to send verification code',
    configLoadFailed: 'Failed to load configuration, please refresh the page'
  },
  browserRestricted: {
    title: 'Browser Access Restricted',
    subtitle: 'Current browser is not supported',
    description: 'To ensure the best browsing experience and security, this website does not support the browser you are using.',
    recommendText: 'Please use one of the recommended browsers below to access:',
    currentBrowser: 'You are currently using:',
    currentUrl: 'Sign-in URL:',
    downloadChrome: 'Download Chrome Browser',
    downloadEdge: 'Download Edge Browser',
    downloadSafari: 'Download Safari Browser',
    openWithRecommended: 'Open the current page with a recommended browser',
    whyRestricted: 'Why are some browsers restricted?',
    whyRestrictedDesc: 'Some browsers may have security issues or lack support for necessary features. We restrict these browsers to ensure your account security and provide a better user experience.',
    supportedBrowsersTitle: 'List of Supported Browsers',
    browserNames: {
      Chrome: 'Chrome Browser',
      Edge: 'Edge Browser',
      Firefox: 'Firefox Browser',
      Safari: 'Safari Browser',
      Opera: 'Opera Browser',
      UC: 'UC Browser',
      Maxthon: 'Maxthon Browser',
      Unknown: 'Unknown Browser'
    }
  },
  landing: {
    mainText: SITE_CONFIG.landingText['en-US'] || 'Explore the infinite possibilities of the global network',
    scrollText: 'Scroll down to sign in',
    exploreButton: 'Start Exploring'
  },
  contextMenu: {
    refresh: 'Refresh Page',
    back: 'Go Back',
    forward: 'Go Forward',
    copy: 'Copy',
    paste: 'Paste'
  },
  service: {
    title: 'Online Support',
    description: 'Chat with our support team in real time',
    loading: 'Loading support system...',
    waitForIcon: 'Please wait a moment; click the chat icon if it appears',
    loadError: 'Failed to load support system',
    retry: 'Retry',
    offline: 'Support is currently offline',
    leaveMessage: 'Leave a Message',
    startChat: 'Start Chat',
    back: 'Back'
  },
  common: {
    appName: SITE_CONFIG.siteName,
    welcome: `Welcome to ${SITE_CONFIG.siteName}`,
    login: 'Sign In',
    register: 'Register',
    logout: 'Sign Out',
    email: 'Email',
    password: 'Password',
    confirmPassword: 'Confirm Password',
    forgotPassword: 'Forgot Password?',
    resetPassword: 'Reset Password',
    rememberMe: 'Remember Me',
    submit: 'Submit',
    cancel: 'Cancel',
    save: 'Save',
    back: 'Back',
    loading: 'Loading...',
    verificationCode: 'Verification Code',
    sendCode: 'Send Verification Code',
    verify: 'Verify',
    enterEmail: 'Enter email address',
    enterVerificationCode: 'Enter verification code',
    enterPassword: 'Enter password',
    selectEmailDomain: 'Select email domain',
    toggleTheme: 'Toggle Theme',
    language: 'Language',
    optional: '(Optional)',
    copied: 'Copied to clipboard',
    copy: 'Copy',
    copyFailed: 'Copy failed',
    apiChecking: 'Checking API availability...',
    checking: 'Checking',
    completed: 'Completed'
  }
};
